testcase.name: loginWithoutRememberMeShouldReturnOnlyAccessToken
testcase.system-out:
21:34:23.061 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.badmintion.authservice.integration.AuthFlowIntegrationTest]: AuthFlowIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:34:23.178 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.badmintion.authservice.AuthServiceApplication for test class com.badmintion.authservice.integration.AuthFlowIntegrationTest

:: Spring Boot :: (v3.3.5)

Found 2 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-03-25T21:34:25.047+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.cloud.context.scope.GenericScope : BeanFactory id=f1d4a7e7-650b-33d3-8a6c-a557e88018b6 2026-03-25T21:34:27.942+07:00 WARN 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] trationDelegate$BeanPostProcessorChecker : Bean 'org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerAutoConfiguration$DeferringLoadBalancerInterceptorConfig' of type [org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerAutoConfiguration$DeferringLoadBalancerInterceptorConfig] is not eligible for getting processed by all BeanPostProcessors (for example: not eligible for auto-proxying). The currently created BeanPostProcessor [lbRestClientPostProcessor] is declared through a non-static factory method on that class; consider declaring it as static instead. 2026-03-25T21:34:27.955+07:00 WARN 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] trationDelegate$BeanPostProcessorChecker : Bean 'deferringLoadBalancerInterceptor' of type [org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.DeferringLoadBalancerInterceptor] is not eligible for getting processed by all BeanPostProcessors (for example: not eligible for auto-proxying). Is this bean getting eagerly injected/applied to a currently created BeanPostProcessor [lbRestClientPostProcessor]? Check the corresponding BeanPostProcessor declaration and its dependencies/advisors. If this bean does not have to be post-processed, declare it with ROLE_INFRASTRUCTURE. 2026-03-25T21:34:28.814+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-03-25T21:34:29.198+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.5.3.Final 2026-03-25T21:34:29.296+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-03-25T21:34:29.642+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-03-25T21:34:29.702+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-03-25T21:34:30.126+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:auth_test user=SA 2026-03-25T21:34:30.136+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-03-25T21:34:33.056+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-03-25T21:34:33.179+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-03-25T21:34:35.636+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] eAuthenticationProviderManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with AuthenticationProvider bean with name authenticationProvider 2026-03-25T21:34:35.642+07:00 WARN 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] r$InitializeUserDetailsManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with an AuthenticationProvider bean. UserDetailsService beans will not be used for username/password login. Consider removing the AuthenticationProvider bean. Alternatively, consider using the UserDetailsService in a manually instantiated DaoAuthenticationProvider. 2026-03-25T21:34:35.880+07:00 WARN 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. Explicitly configure spring.jpa.open-in-view to disable this warning 2026-03-25T21:34:39.141+07:00 DEBUG 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter : Filter 'jwtAuthenticationFilter' configured for use 2026-03-25T21:34:39.146+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-03-25T21:34:39.146+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-03-25T21:34:39.148+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 2 ms 2026-03-25T21:34:39.544+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] DiscoveryClientOptionalArgsConfiguration : Eureka HTTP Client uses RestTemplate. 2026-03-25T21:34:39.695+07:00 WARN 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] iguration$LoadBalancerCaffeineWarnLogger : Spring Cloud LoadBalancer is currently working with the default cache. While this cache implementation is useful for development and tests, it's recommended to use Caffeine cache in production.You can switch to using Caffeine cache, by adding it and org.springframework.cache.caffeine.CaffeineCacheManager to the classpath. 2026-03-25T21:34:39.798+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.i.AuthFlowIntegrationTest : Started AuthFlowIntegrationTest in 16.484 seconds (process running for 17.377) 2026-03-25T21:34:40.400+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received register request for username=tester_no_remember, email=tester_no_remember@example.com 2026-03-25T21:34:40.401+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register attempt for username=tester_no_remember, email=tester_no_remember@example.com 2026-03-25T21:34:40.998+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register success for username=tester_no_remember, role=USER 2026-03-25T21:34:40.998+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Register completed for username=tester_no_remember 2026-03-25T21:34:41.058+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received login request for username=tester_no_remember, rememberMe=false 2026-03-25T21:34:41.065+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Login attempt for username=tester_no_remember, rememberMe=false 2026-03-25T21:34:41.348+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Login success without remember-me for username=tester_no_remember 2026-03-25T21:34:41.349+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Login completed for username=tester_no_remember, role=USER

testcase.name: loginRememberMeRefreshAndLogoutFlowShouldWork
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-25T21:34:41.469+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received register request for username=tester_login, email=tester_login@example.com 2026-03-25T21:34:41.469+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register attempt for username=tester_login, email=tester_login@example.com 2026-03-25T21:34:41.596+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register success for username=tester_login, role=USER 2026-03-25T21:34:41.596+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Register completed for username=tester_login 2026-03-25T21:34:41.604+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received login request for username=tester_login, rememberMe=true 2026-03-25T21:34:41.605+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Login attempt for username=tester_login, rememberMe=true 2026-03-25T21:34:41.765+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Refresh token persisted for username=tester_login, expiresAt=2026-03-25T15:34:41.462Z 2026-03-25T21:34:41.766+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Login success with remember-me for username=tester_login, refreshTokenPrefix=refresh-toke... 2026-03-25T21:34:41.768+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Login completed for username=tester_login, role=USER 2026-03-25T21:34:41.881+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received refresh request with tokenPrefix=refresh-toke... 2026-03-25T21:34:41.883+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Refresh attempt with tokenPrefix=refresh-toke... 2026-03-25T21:34:41.910+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Refresh success for username=tester_login, role=USER 2026-03-25T21:34:41.911+07:00 INFO 26372 Received logout request with tokenPrefix=refresh-toke... 2026-03-25T21:34:41.924+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Logout attempt with tokenPrefix=refresh-toke... 2026-03-25T21:34:41.936+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Logout success for username=tester_login, token revoked 2026-03-25T21:34:41.966+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Logout completed for tokenPrefix=refresh-toke... 2026-03-25T21:34:41.975+07:00 INFO 26372 --- c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Refresh attempt with tokenPrefix=refresh-toke...

testcase.name: registerShouldCreateUser
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-25T21:34:42.016+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received register request for username=tester_register, email=tester_register@example.com 2026-03-25T21:34:42.017+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register attempt for username=tester_register, email=tester_register@example.com 2026-03-25T21:34:42.164+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register success for username=tester_register, role=USER 2026-03-25T21:34:42.164+07:00 INFO 26372 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Register completed for username=tester_register
